{{ERROR_NAME}}   {{WOW_BADGE}} traffic-driven, not failure-rate
dominant caller: {{DOMINANT_APP}}
Verdict: {{VERDICT_PARAGRAPH}}
Calling app Δ overall requests WoW Per-request failure rate (prev → cur) Δ failure rate
{{APP_1}} {{APP_1_DELTA_REQ}} {{APP_1_PREV_RATE}} → {{APP_1_CUR_RATE}} {{APP_1_DELTA_RATE}}
Routing: 📝 {{CALLER_OWNER_TEAM}} (not broker). Per-request failure rate is essentially flat, so a code regression in the broker is not implicated. The error spike is a function of {{DOMINANT_APP}} sending {{APP_1_DELTA_REQ}} more requests this week.
